title: Serenity
description: a project i will try to update daily, each will be separated via phase's.
body:
this is a mod i wanted to do cause i was bored.
i will try to update it daily, but dont count on it.
currently there is only phase 1, before starting you gotta beat the game.

important to know crafting recipes will be added in the gallary.

**!!important!!**
the portals to each phases dimension uses the same blocks as the nether portal! (obsidian), only end cursor recipes will be provided for the crafts (in gallary), use of JEI is reccomended.
and most importantly, _take good care of your end cursor!_ a high phase cursor being destroyed could possibly cause you to loose hours maybe days of progress!
